text: I first asked the delivery estimate, but now the promised date passed and the card is absent.
label: card_arrival

text: 不是问多久会到，是已经寄出的卡没收到。
label: card_arrival

text: The app says shipped; the card is still missing.
label: card_arrival

text: I have not ordered yet; I only need the usual card delivery window.
label: card_delivery_estimate

text: Before requesting the spare card, how many days should shipping take?
label: card_delivery_estimate

text: 不是丢卡，我只是问预计送达时间。
label: card_delivery_estimate

text: The transfer is stuck in my app; the recipient has not checked yet.
label: pending_transfer

text: Not a missing-recipient complaint; my own transfer status still says processing.
label: pending_transfer

text: 我看到 transfer pending，但还没确认收款方。
label: pending_transfer

text: My side says sent, but the receiver insists no money arrived.
label: transfer_not_received_by_recipient

text: This is beyond pending; the payee checked and sees nothing.
label: transfer_not_received_by_recipient

text: 收款人说没到账，即使我这里显示完成。
label: transfer_not_received_by_recipient

text: I understand the reason; now I need the steps to finish verification.
label: verify_my_identity

text: How do I upload documents to prove who I am?
label: verify_my_identity

text: 不是问为什么，是问如何完成身份验证。
label: verify_my_identity

text: I am not asking where to upload files; why do you need this check?
label: why_verify_identity

text: What triggered identity verification on my account?
label: why_verify_identity

text: 为什么现在要求我提供证件？
label: why_verify_identity

text: I need to begin a refund request for the order.
label: request_refund

text: Not a missing refund; I have not asked for one yet.
label: request_refund

text: 请帮我把这笔 purchase 申请退款。
label: request_refund

text: The merchant already issued the refund, yet no credit is visible.
label: Refund_not_showing_up

text: 不是要新申请，退款确认后还没显示。
label: Refund_not_showing_up

text: I returned the item and still cannot see the refund.
label: Refund_not_showing_up

text: A completed card purchase appeared that I cannot identify.
label: card_payment_not_recognised

text: Not just declined or pending; a merchant charged my card and I do not know them.
label: card_payment_not_recognised

text: 我看到一笔陌生 card payment。
label: card_payment_not_recognised

text: The merchant says the card purchase failed at checkout.
label: declined_card_payment

text: 不是陌生扣款，是付款当场被拒。
label: declined_card_payment

text: The card terminal rejected the payment.
label: declined_card_payment
